en: Now on the first day of the week Mary Magdalene came to the tomb early, while it was still dark, and saw that the stone had been taken away from the tomb.
zh: 禮拜日清早，天還沒有亮的時候，抹大拉的馬利亞來到墓旁，看見石頭已經從墳墓移開了。

en: So she ran and went to Simon Peter and the other disciple, the one whom Jesus loved, and said to them, "They have taken the Lord out of the tomb, and we do not know where they have laid him."
zh: 她就跑去見西門．彼得，和耶穌所愛的那個門徒，對他們說：“有人把主從墳墓裡搬走了，我們不知道他們把他放在哪裡。”

en: So Peter went out with the other disciple, and they were going toward the tomb.
zh: 彼得和那門徒就動身，到墳墓那裡去。

en: Both of them were running together, but the other disciple outran Peter and reached the tomb first.
zh: 兩個人一齊跑，那門徒比彼得跑得快，先到了墳墓，

en: And stooping to look in, he saw the linen cloths lying there, but he did not go in.
zh: 屈身向裡面觀看，看見細麻布還在那裡，但他卻沒有進去。

en: Then Simon Peter came, following him, and went into the tomb. He saw the linen cloths lying there,
zh: 西門．彼得隨後也到了；他進入墳墓，看見細麻布還放在那裡，

en: and the face cloth, which had been on Jesus' head, not lying with the linen cloths but folded up in a place by itself.
zh: 也看見耶穌的裹頭巾，沒有和細麻布放在一起，而是捲著放在一邊。

en: Then the other disciple, who had reached the tomb first, also went in, and he saw and believed;
zh: 那時，先到墳墓的那門徒也進去，他看見，就信了。

en: for as yet they did not understand the Scripture, that he must rise from the dead.
zh: 他們還不明白經上所說“他必須從死人中復活”這句話的意思。

en: Then the disciples went back to their homes.
zh: 於是兩個門徒就回家去了。

en: But Mary stood weeping outside the tomb, and as she wept she stooped to look into the tomb.
zh: 馬利亞站在墳墓外面哭泣。她哭的時候，屈身往裡面觀看，

en: And she saw two angels in white, sitting where the body of Jesus had lain, one at the head and one at the feet.
zh: 看見兩個身穿白衣的天使，坐在安放耶穌身體的地方，一個在頭那邊，一個在腳那邊。

en: They said to her, "Woman, why are you weeping?" She said to them, "They have taken away my Lord, and I do not know where they have laid him."
zh: 天使問她：“婦人，你為甚麼哭？”她說：“有人把我的主搬走了，我不知道他們把他放在哪裡。”

en: Having said this, she turned around and saw Jesus standing, but she did not know that it was Jesus.
zh: 馬利亞說了這話，就轉過身來，看見耶穌站在那裡，卻不知道他就是耶穌。

en: Jesus said to her, "Woman, why are you weeping? Whom are you seeking?" Supposing him to be the gardener, she said to him, "Sir, if you have carried him away, tell me where you have laid him, and I will take him away."
zh: 耶穌對她說：“婦人，你為甚麼哭？你找誰呢？”馬利亞以為耶穌是園丁，就對他說：“先生，如果是你把他挪去了，請告訴我你把他放在甚麼地方，我好去搬回來。”

en: Jesus said to her, "Mary." She turned and said to him in Aramaic, "Rabboni!" (which means Teacher).
zh: 耶穌對她說：“馬利亞！”她轉過身來，用希伯來話對他說：“拉波尼！”

en: Jesus said to her, "Do not cling to me, for I have not yet ascended to the Father; but go to my brothers and say to them, 'I am ascending to my Father and your Father, to my God and your God.'"
zh: 耶穌說：“你不要拉住我，因為我還沒有上去見父。你要到我的弟兄們那裡去，告訴他們我要上去見我的父，也是你們的父；見我的 神，也是你們的 神。”

en: Mary Magdalene went and announced to the disciples, "I have seen the Lord"- and that he had said these things to her.
zh: 抹大拉的馬利亞就去，向門徒報信說：“我已經看見主了！”她又把主對她所說的話告訴他們。

en: On the evening of that day, the first day of the week, the doors being locked where the disciples were for fear of the Jews, Jesus came and stood among them and said to them, "Peace be with you."
zh: 禮拜日黃昏的時候，門徒聚在一起，因為怕猶太人，就把門戶都關上。耶穌來了，站在他們中間，說：“願你們平安。”

en: When he had said this, he showed them his hands and his side. Then the disciples were glad when they saw the Lord.
zh: 說了這話，就把手和肋旁給他們看。門徒看見主，就歡喜了。

en: Jesus said to them again, "Peace be with you. As the Father has sent me, even so I am sending you."
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“願你們平安。父怎樣差遣了我，我也怎樣差遣你們。”

en: And when he had said this, he breathed on them and said to them, "Receive the Holy Spirit.
zh: 說了這話，就向他們吹一口氣，說：“你們領受聖靈吧！

en: If you forgive the sins of anyone, they are forgiven; if you withhold forgiveness from anyone, it is withheld."
zh: 你們赦免誰的罪，誰的罪就得赦免；你們不赦免誰的罪，誰的罪就不得赦免。”

en: Now Thomas, one of the Twelve, called the Twin, was not with them when Jesus came.
zh: 十二個門徒中，有一個稱為“雙生子” 的多馬。耶穌來的時候，他沒有和門徒在一起。

en: So the other disciples told him, "We have seen the Lord." But he said to them, "Unless I see in his hands the mark of the nails, and place my finger into the mark of the nails, and place my hand into his side, I will never believe."
zh: 其他的門徒對他說：“我們已經見過主了。”多馬對他們說：“除非我親眼看見他手上的釘痕，用我的指頭探入那釘痕，又用我的手探入他的肋旁，我決不相信。”

en: Eight days later, his disciples were inside again, and Thomas was with them. Although the doors were locked, Jesus came and stood among them and said, "Peace be with you."
zh: 過了八天，門徒又在屋子裡，多馬也和他們在一起。門戶都關上了。耶穌來了，站在他們中間，說：“願你們平安。”

en: Then he said to Thomas, "Put your finger here, and see my hands; and put out your hand, and place it in my side. Do not disbelieve, but believe."
zh: 然後對多馬說：“把你的指頭放在這裡，看看我的手吧！伸出你的手來，探探我的肋旁！不要疑惑，只要信！”

en: Thomas answered him, "My Lord and my God!"
zh: 多馬對他說：“我的主！我的 神！”

en: Jesus said to him, "Have you believed because you have seen me? Blessed are those who have not seen and yet have believed."
zh: 耶穌說：“你因為看見我才信嗎？那些沒有看見就信的人，是有福的。”

en: Now Jesus did many other signs in the presence of the disciples, which are not written in this book;
zh: 耶穌在門徒面前還行了許多別的神蹟，沒有記在這書上。

en: but these are written so that you may believe that Jesus is the Christ, the Son of God, and that by believing you may have life in his name.
zh: 但把這些事記下來，是要你們信耶穌是基督，是 神的兒子，並且使你們信了，可以因他的名得生命。
